source.description: Checked-in aggregate Q4 SLO stats fixture for deterministic reference builds.

sampling.notes: The checked-in aggregate represents the full 250-request reference population; no runtime sampling is performed.

pii_handling.notes: Reference fixture only; no live user traffic or recoverable PII is included.

extensions.notes: Canonical Q4 reference manifest. Mean cost is normative; p95 cost is diagnostic-only.
